programs.title: Blue World
programs.sub_title: Muck Diving in the Philippines + The Annual Alewife Run in Maine, USA
programs.desc: Following muck diving in the Philippines, searching for one of the rarest octopuses in the world, the Wunderpus. Then traveling to Maine in the USA for the annual Alewife Run and witnessing hundreds of thousands of fish moving upstream to spawn.

programs.title: Private Islands
programs.desc: Amber Coco Plum, an adult-only resort in Belize, to learn about its history and to tour its secluded cabanas; Amber visits ancient Mayan ruins; Amber zips through the Belize rainforest.

programs.title: Behind the Gates
programs.desc: A tour of a custom Mediterranean estate, a penthouse with 360 degree views of the strip and a contemporary home with it's own genre.

programs.title: Travel Thru History
programs.desc: Standing on the stage of the Grand Ole Opry; visiting the home of the 7th US President Andrew Jackson; visiting the largest recreation of the Parthenon outside of Greece.

programs.title: Dream Cruises
programs.desc: With 780 cabins and accommodations to more than 1,500 passengers, the elegant Italian MSC Lirica will cruise the West Indies; ports-of-call are Dominican Republic, Saint Martin, Martinique, Guadeloupe, Antigua, and Tortola.

programs.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programs.desc: Marco and Allie tour the Pine Tree Rat Pack house with Tara West; Steve makes his last pitch to convince Allie to leave San Diego.
